caption: A person's hands are shown opening a collectible card product atop a themed mat featuring palm trees and a beach scene. In the initial sequence, a hand reaches for and removes a yellow package from a white box. The setting includes a background with "JASPYS LIVE" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" logos and a small person sitting at a desk visible in a screen-in-screen inset. As the sequence progresses, the person reveals a sports trading card featuring an athlete in a red cap and a signature that reads "Brian Larkin." The person then places the card into a clear plastic protective sleeve. The environment is consistent throughout, featuring various card-related equipment and a digital display showing the same individual in a dark t-shirt monitoring the process.
